session.user: Run `prettier --check "docs/learned/**/*.md"` and report whether it passes or fails. Only report the result - do not fix anything.
session.assistant: I'll run the prettier check on the markdown files in the docs/learned directory.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check prettier formatting for markdown files

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix.
Checking formatting...
session.assistant:
prettier failed: Code style issues found in 2 files.
**Files that need formatting:** - docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md - docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md
